title: Dark GUI Enhanced
description: Gives you a clean modern Dark GUI for Minecraft
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3f544f31e3c3ac9eb0c8ba7ca4df4b9c48ae052.png)
> ### ![Notice](https://img.icons8.com/material-rounded/ffffff/16/error--v1.png) Notice
**Please set your in-game language to English US for most of the custom features to work (Button glyphs, Brewing Stand cheat sheet, Container Blocks graphical renders)**

> ### ![Desc](https://img.icons8.com/material-rounded/ffffff/16/multiline-text.png) Description
Overhauls the Minecraft GUI giving it a more **modern and 3D feel**.

![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b00d342a5675780f7d8d381e5db2d242a756aa91.gif)

> ### ![Addons](https://img.icons8.com/material-rounded/ffffff/16/puzzle.png) New in v2.2
![Brewing Cheat-Sheet small](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a18b51e18eeec975caf52fa90edae688187a4d6e.png)

> ### ![Issue](https://img.icons8.com/material-rounded/ffffff/16/error--v1.png) Change Log
Send an **issue report or feedback** by filling out the **form** _(requires Google login)_.

- **If you showcase my pack in a video** feel free to **send me a link** in the form. I would truly appreciate it. :)

[![Button](https://i.imgur.com/om59Noe.png)](https://forms.gle/YUEKAxePt83EsLB37)

```
[Jul/15/2025] Dark GUI Enhanced v3.0
└ [!Notice] Dark GUI Enhanced Color will be discontinued and will no longer be recieving new updates. 
└ Added a graphical render of each container inside it's GUI.
└ Fixed the Crafting Table GUI texture missing border.
└ Added texures for the 'Experience' bar, the new 'Player Locator' bar, and Horse/Camel jump bars.
└ Changed the 'Selected Button' texure to make it look more interactible and updated the elements of the Advancements menu that (colored blue/yellow) for better readability.

[May/02/2025] Dark GUI Enhanced v2.2 & Dark GUI Enhanced Color v2.2c
└ v2.2 & v2.2c released added a cheat-sheet to the Brewing Stadn GUI (+added v2.1 feature to the 'Color' version)

[Apr/17/2025] Dark GUI Enhanced v2.1
└ v2.1 released re-textrued the selector for the hotbar, server list, resourcepack list and world list.

[Feb/12/2025] Dark GUI Enhanced Color v2.0c
└ v2.0c released added a different look for some GUIs'

[Feb/11/2025] Dark GUI Enhanced v2.0
└ v2.0 released with a rework of the design

[Sep/07/2024] Dark GUI Enhanced v1.0
└ v1.0 released
```
